Jo easiest लगे, wahi karo.

strategy_intent: One-time systemic normalisation for de-isolation.
text: Aise dual setback phase mein bahut candidates yahi bolte hain - body pe load aa jata hai aur start point dikhta nahi; sirf tum nahi ho is pattern mein.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ab kya karoon practical, aaj hi kuch chhota step chahiye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Readiness pe 3 sub-10-min options देना.
text: Aaj ke liye 3 tiny options: (1) 5 min slow breathing; (2) ek page par sirf kal ke 2 priority tasks likho; (3) job portal ke liye 15 min timer lagao, uske baad close. Itna hi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Breathing se start karta hoon, abhi bhi saans phas rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Chosen breathing ko clear step-by-step guide karna.
text: Pehle seedha baitho, shoulders ko dheere se loose karo. Phir 4 count inhale aur 6 count exhale, total 10 rounds. Last mein ek line bolo: 'abhi bas agla step.' Bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kiya, dil thoda settle lag raha hai. Head pressure bhi kam hua.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Structural reframe देकर self-blame reduce करना.
text: Role loss ka relation aksar market aur company priorities se hota hai, tumhari basic ability se nahi. Is baat ko hold karna panic loop ko dheere-dheere kam karta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Portal still trigger karta hai, lekin timer idea useful laga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Trigger handling ke 2 concrete mini-rules dena.
text: Do mini-rules set karo: (1) portal open se pehle 3 slow exhales; (2) sirf saved filters pe apply, random scrolling nahi. Isse overload kam hoga.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, random scrolling hi mujhe todta hai. Filter method manageable lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens B se control-return aur effort framing mirror karna.
text: Tum chaos se bahar aake process ko apne control mein la rahe ho, aur yahi sustainable step hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Raat ka darr fir bhi reh jata hai ki kal kuch progress na hui toh?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mild risk + Lens E se future fear ko hold karna.
text: Yeh sunke dil bhaari hua - raat mein future ka uncertainty bada lagta hai, isliye progress ka pressure aur tez chubhta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly, fir neend toot toot ke aati hai aur subah thakan heavy hoti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Sleep disruption ko normal stress response ke roop mein validate karna.
text: Aise stress phase mein broken sleep aur next-day fatigue common hai, yeh tumhari weakness ka proof nahi. Tum stepwise regulate kar rahe ho, woh meaningful progress hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek, kal fixed routine se start karunga. Ab itna hopeless nahi lag raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ready state pe concise three-block plan lock karna.
text: Kal ka short plan: 5 min breathing, 20 min filtered applications, 10 min next-day prep note. Teen blocks enough hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ab dimaag wali seeti ka intensity kam lag raha hai. Body bhi thodi normal ho rahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final systemic reframe on transition pacing.
text: Career transitions mein recovery straight line mein nahi hoti; small consistent blocks long-term result dete hain. Tum ab wahi realistic pattern pe aa gaye ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, ab lag raha handle kar lunga agar isi pace pe rahun.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens C se self-trust relation mirror karna.
text: Tum khud ke saath trust rebuild kar rahe ho, aur yahi despair se bahar nikalne ka core anchor banega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yes, ab better feel ho raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens D se aaj ke gains ko tomorrow continuity frame dena.
text: Aaj ka yeh steadiness kal repeat hua toh panic spikes naturally aur neeche aayenge.

speaker: Seeker
text: Noted, aaj ke liye enough lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Close pe 2 tiny continuation tasks देना.
text: Sone se pehle 6 slow breaths aur kal ke 3 blocks notes mein tick-box bana do. Bas itna hi, no extra load.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: gale mein ajeeb sa gola phans gaya
text: Gale mein ajeeb sa gola phans gaya hai, layoff mail dekhte hi awaaz baith gayi. Tier-1 city ke kharche soch ke body freeze ho gayi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens A se exact body phrase mirror karke initial overload hold karna.
text: Mail ke baad gale ka woh phansa hua gola aur baithi hui awaaz tum par seedha stress ka weight daal rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, ungliyan sunn pad gayi thi, typing bhi mushkil ho gaya. Family honour ka pressure alag chal raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens E se honour-loss fear ko softly mirror karna.
text: Body numbness ke saath tumhara darr yeh bhi hai ki ghar ki izzat aur expectation par asar na pad jaye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly, lagta hai poora system collapse ho jayega. Dimaag mein heavy thakan chipak gayi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Do restatements ke baad strongest trigger moment identify karna.
text: Yeh collapse-wala feel sabse zyada kab आता hai - expense sheet dekhte waqt, family call pe, ya job apply start karte hi?

speaker: Seeker
text: Expense sheet pe. Numbers dekhte hi haath phir sunn ho jaate hain aur chest tight ho jati hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mild risk warm line + Lens D se repeating trigger cycle mirror.
text: Yeh sunke dil bhaari ho gaya. Har baar numbers dekhte hi same body-loop repeat hota hai, isliye thakan aur zyada jam jaati hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Core issue ye hai ki main andar se khali feel kar raha hoon. Upar se normal dikh raha hoon bas.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Employment stress ke neeche wali deep exhaustion reflect karna.
text: Lagta hai tum itne drained ho ki effort karne se pehle hi energy drop ho jaati hai, aur woh bahut heavy lag raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, aur bolne mein sharam lagti hai. Lagta hai weak lagunga toh respect kam ho jayegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Stigma cue protocol: short restatement only, no question.
text: Respect kho dene ka darr tumhe chup rehne par majboor kar raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul, aur jab chup rehta hoon toh gale ka gola phir se phans jata hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Tier-1 cost + family honour context mein response normalise karna and worth separate karna.
text: High city expenses aur family honour pressure ke beech aisa somatic stress aana bahut common hai. Tumhari value sirf current job status se define nahi hoti.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thoda halka laga, par ab bhi samajh nahi aa raha pehla practical step kya ho.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: One-time systemic anecdote to reduce isolation and shame.
text: MNC layoff phase mein kaafi log yahi bolte hain - body shut-down jaisa feel hota hai aur bolne mein sharam aati hai; yeh sirf tumhara case nahi, bas log openly share nahi karte.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai, ab kya karoon aaj ke liye? Chhota actionable chahiye.

text: Aaj ke liye 3 micro-steps: (1) 5 min slow exhale breathing; (2) expense sheet mein sirf 'must pay this week' line mark karo; (3) trusted person ko 2-line update bhejo. Bas itna hi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Breathing se start karta hoon, chest tight abhi bhi hai.

text: 10 rounds ke baad gola halka lag raha hai. Awaaz bhi thodi better hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Layoff ko structural event reframe karke shame load reduce karna.

speaker: Seeker

speaker: Supporter
